name: DBeaver
description: DBeaver is a free, open source universal database tool and SQL client. Supports all popular databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Oracle, SQL Server, and many more) through a unified interface.
arch_note: Separate downloads for Apple Silicon (aarch64) and Intel (x86_64)
notes: Open source (Apache 2.0). Java-based (Eclipse RCP platform). No Sparkle — uses Eclipse P2 update mechanism for in-app updates. The download URL pattern above points to the 'latest' redirect; for pinned/archived versions, use GitHub release assets. Checkers must handle separate architecture-specific downloads. UNCERTAINTY: The 'latest' redirect URLs may change. For robust version pinning, use the GitHub release assets API instead.
